narrative:
Ashville-North (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,469 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.7 percentage points.
